title: oplismenus crus-galli var. muticus
intro: Oplismenus crus-galli var. muticus, also known as the variegated false mane grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus crus-galli var. muticus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal properties and potential uses.
